title: erigeron eatonii subsp. plantagineus
intro: Erigeron eatonii subsp. plantagineus, also known as a subspecies of the Eaton's fleabane or the plantaginean fleabane, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erigeron eatonii subsp. plantagineus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and respiratory infections. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil to utilize its medicinal properties.
